turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
Hi, I need help with my oven.
Sorry to hear that — what's the brand and model of the oven, and what's it doing?
Thanks — a GE JB645RKSS oven. What's it doing?
I smell gas near the oven when i try to turn it on.

That's a gas smell when you try to turn it on from your GE JB645RKSS oven — that's a safety hazard, so please stop using it right now, shut off the gas at the valve and don't touch any switches, and step away. I won't have you keep troubleshooting a gas leak over the phone; this needs a professional. If the smell is strong, leave the home and call your gas company or 911. Would you like me to schedule a technician for your GE JB645RKSS oven?
Okay, I'll turn it off right now.
Good — thanks for shutting it off; safety first. Shall I schedule a technician for your GE JB645RKSS oven?
Done — I'll get a technician arranged for your GE JB645RKSS oven, and they'll follow up to confirm a time.

symptoms.description: I smell gas near the oven when I try to turn it on

steps_given: Shut off power/gas to the oven immediately.
Do not attempt further troubleshooting until a technician inspects it.
